title: [FIRRTL][circt-reduce] firrtl-remove-unused-ports can't handle probes
body:
Consider the following:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module private @Bar(
    out %ref: !firrtl.probe<clock>
  ) {
  }
  firrtl.module @Foo() {
    %Bar_ref = firrtl.instance Bar @Bar(
      out ref: !firrtl.probe<clock>
    )
  }
}
```

This will crash if run with:

``` console
# circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' firrtl-remove-unused-ports.1.mlir -include firrtl-remove-unused-ports -o /dev/null
Reading input
Testing input with `exit 0`
Initial module has size 221
Trying reduction `firrtl-remove-unused-ports`
Assertion failed: (isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"), function cast, file Casting.h, line 560.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-reduce -skip-initial "-test=exit 0" firrtl-remove-unused-ports.1.mlir -include firrtl-remove-unused-ports -o /dev/null
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-reduce             0x0000000102367c34 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-reduce             0x0000000102365b1c llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 172

8  circt-reduce             0x000000010269e0d8 circt::firrtl::patterns::AddOfPad::~AddOfPad() + 0
9  circt-reduce             0x000000010282e020 (anonymous namespace)::RemoveUnusedPortsPass::runOnOperation() + 3056
10 circt-reduce             0x0000000103475108 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) + 1340
11 circt-reduce             0x0000000103475a04 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(mlir::OpPassManager&, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) + 620
```
